'''HR 51''' was the room in [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]] where [[Bink Otauna/Legends|Bink Otauna]], dressed as a [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]], blasted [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]].
